name: Richard Meier

acts.description: Five women accused him of sexual harassment spanning decades; accusations emerged in 2018

behavior_summary: Five women accused him of groping and sexual harassment over a 25-year period. He stepped down from his firm in 2018.

art.summary: Pritzker Prize-winning architect. White, rectilinear buildings are among the most recognizable of late 20th-century architecture.

verdict.blurb: Designed some of the most pristine, precisely controlled spaces in the modern world while spending decades ensuring women in his orbit felt none of that control.
